capabilities_used.evidence: 他直接发过“$ETH falling wedge . a strong pop any moment”(2025-04-14)；图片6是 TOTAL3 4h 标准下降楔形上破；图片1 的 BTC 暴跌后也用收敛下跌结构去推演反弹路径。
“This small pull back is a trap . prepare for pump”(2025-06-12)；“not the real bounce yet”(2025-07-24)；“massive bull trap?”(2024-01-30)；他反复把回撤、假反弹、假突破解释为 trap。

“First they flush then they pump . market has been flushed now we pump”(2025-02-17)；“Maybe one last shake out but won’t last long”(2024-12-23)；“we called this second flush out”(2025-02-28)。这是典型先扫流动性再反转的叙事。
“$BTC Dominance breaking a 2 year trend!! LFG!!”(2024-05-28)；“$BTC dominance weakining . Alts is the play”(2025-02-28)；图片8就是 BTC.D 周线趋势线破位，明显拿它当 altseason 触发器。
“Guys, 4 Hr, 8Hr and 12Hr RSI have reset and the market is expected to bounce pretty strong”(2024-05-30)；图片4 用的是超卖区反弹逻辑，虽然指标更像 Stoch RSI，但本质仍是超卖重置后看反弹。
“$BTC is in a bull trend . its clear . Now we looking for the next bottom”(2025-03-11)；“The $BTC pullback is nearly over”(2025-07-24)；图片7 在上升背景里给出 106.3k-106.9k buy zone，预期回踩后继续上攻。
“i officially have zero stables . all in on crypto baby !!”(2025-02-17)；“I am officially all in on crypto”(2024-04-30)；“$BTC is in a bull trend . its clear”(2025-03-11)。他的默认市场制度判断长期偏牛。
图片7 给出明确的 BTC 绿色支撑区买点与红色上方阻力；图片3 用 SOL 横向阻力箱体突破看 300；他习惯先画区间/箱体，再讲回踩与突破。
他经常把短线 pullback 当作主升中的整理，例如“this small pull back is a trap . prepare for pump”(2025-06-12)；图片7 的路径推演也是先回踩、再续涨到新高。
虽然图上很少直接画均线，但他的表述经常带有‘reclaiming ground’风格，如“$BTC Bulls slowly reclaiming ground . Pump to $100K is loading”(2025-04-14)。这是次级信号，不是核心框架。
他的版本不是机械抄底，而是等 flush/shakeout 结束后再上：“do NOT make the mistake of buying too early and getting trapped again”(2024-12-20)。虽然后续常激进加仓，但会强调别买太早。
“People are not ready for how ugly this can get”(2024-11-26)；“upcoming trap”(2024-12-18)。他知道高波动和洗盘环境，但更多是把它当机会，而非严格风险收缩条件。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Diagonal Trendline Break and Retest
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use a simple long-duration descending or ascending trendline, wait for break, then validate with an immediate retest before projecting the next impulsive move.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用长周期斜向趋势线，等待价格突破后，再观察是否回踩确认，随后推演下一段趋势性推动。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片2 的 XRP 周线、图片5 的 TOTAL3 日线、图片8 的 BTC.D 周线，都是非常典型的斜趋势线破位/回踩框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Stoch RSI Reset Bounce
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After strong trend cooling, Stoch RSI resets into the lower band and turns up; trader interprets it as energy reset rather than trend failure.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 强趋势中的调整阶段，Stoch RSI 回到低位后重新拐头向上，被视为动能重置而非趋势结束。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片4 明确画出了 Total Market Cap ex BTC/ETH 的 Stoch RSI 低位区域，并把历史几次同类低位与后续上涨对应起来。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Altseason Rotation Stack
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Combine BTC stabilization, BTC dominance rollover, and TOTAL3 breakout to time altcoin expansion rather than looking at single-coin charts in isolation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 BTC 企稳、BTC.D 走弱、TOTAL3 突破结合起来判断山寨季启动，而不是只看单币图。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “$BTC dominance weakining . Alts is the play”(2025-02-28)；“Release the alts”(2025-05-22)；图片6 看 TOTAL3 楔形上破，图片8 看 BTC.D 破趋势线。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Flush Then Pump Playbook
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Interpret violent selloffs and emotional shakeouts as engineered clearing events before the real move higher, then buy after the panic zone is tagged.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把剧烈回撤和情绪性恐慌视为主升前的清洗动作，在恐慌区/买区被触发后转向看多。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: “First they flush then they pump”(2025-02-17)；“Do NOT get shaken out”(2025-02-19)；“The bounce is going to be epic”(2025-02-28)。

personal_quirks.quote: Bullish on red days . Bearish on green days   Don’t get this wrong
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在情绪最差、价格最红的时候偏向寻找买点；在过热绿K时反而提高警惕。

personal_quirks.quote: DO NOT GET SHAKEN OUT . DO NOT GET SHAKEN OUT . DO NOT GET SHAKEN OUT .
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他的核心纪律是扛过洗盘，不在情绪极端时被甩下车。

personal_quirks.quote: First they flush then they pump . market has been flushed now we pump
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把暴跌视为主力清洗仓位的前置动作，flush 完成后默认看反弹甚至反转。

personal_quirks.quote: Today I will officially be out 100% of dollars and in the altcoin market .   I am buying the fear
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在他判断的周期性机会窗口里，会极高仓位切入高beta山寨，而不是温和配置。

personal_quirks.quote: do NOT make the mistake of buying too early and getting trapped again
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 虽然总体激进看多，但会强调等确认区、等 flush 结束、别过早接刀。

unique_traits: 他和一般 TA 交易员的区别，在于把非常简单的图形工具极度叙事化：趋势线、楔形、支撑箱体、BTC.D、TOTAL3，就足以构建一整套“洗盘-陷阱-爆拉-山寨季”的故事。与重宏观、重链上或重量化的人不同，他的 edge 主要来自高情绪感染力的顺周期/逆情绪做多框架。另一个明显特点是长期默认牛市、默认山寨会补涨，因此分析几乎总是服务于寻找下一次低风险做多切入。
